description: Add an emoji reaction to a Slack message via reactions.add. Requires the channel id and message timestamp (`ts`), typically from slack_list_messages or slack_post_message.

channel_id.description: Slack channel ID containing the message, not the human-readable name.

message_ts.description: Message timestamp identifying the message to react to (Slack `ts` field).

emoji.description: Emoji name without colons (e.g. thumbsup, eyes, white_check_mark).
